title: Liabilities
subtitle: Equity and intercompany current accounts, with balances derived from allocated transactions.

equity.title: New equity position
equity.description: Equity issued by the current organization. The position becomes an allocatable target in the Reconciliation tab.

loan.title: New current account
loan.description: Shareholder current account between two organizations. Its balance is derived from the transactions allocated to it.

errors.failed: The action failed. Please try again.
errors.already_matched_to_deal: This transaction is already matched to a deal. Unmatch it first.
errors.invalid_amount: The amount must be greater than zero.
errors.ambiguous_holder: Pick either an organization or a free-text label, not both.
errors.same_org: The creditor and the debtor must be two different organizations.
errors.not_a_party: You must be a member of at least one of the two organizations of the current account.
